prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on formaldehyde (CH₂O, 4 atoms: O, C, H, H) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', density-fitted RI), in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral singlet). The input geometry was the user-supplied formaldehyde.xyz; no re-optimization was performed (single point). SCF converged in 8 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: trustworthy = true, all checks passed.

Results:
- HOMO (index 7): −7.6523067 eV
- LUMO (index 8): −1.7826355 eV
- HOMO–LUMO gap (headline): 5.8696712 eV
- Total energy: −114.55325 Hartree (−3117.1528 eV)

Koopmans' theorem estimates: vertical IP = 7.6523067 eV, vertical EA = 1.7826355 eV, electronegativity = 4.7174711 eV, chemical hardness = 2.9348356 eV, softness = 0.34073459 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 3.7914447 eV.

Method: DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard), PySCF backend, via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill. Gas phase. Charge 0, multiplicity 1. No warnings. No experimental comparison offered.
